Explanation:
“Outcomes” here are wins plus losses. For 2001–2003 (included): 2001 = 7+2=9, 2002 = 8+1=9, 2003 = 8+1=9; total = 9+9+9 = 27. Excluding 2001–2003, sum 2004–2010: 2004 = 9, 2005 = 8, 2006 = 9, 2007 = 14, 2008 = 11, 2009 = 10, 2010 = 10; total = 71. Thus the include|exclude totals are 27|71, matching the Prediction Answer.
